visible_entities.desc: Logo text reading 'Fine Dining TV' in white serif font, with a yellow horizontal line under 'Dining', set against a dark grey background with a reflection below

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'Fine Dining TV' is displayed on the screen.
A yellow line underlines the word 'Dining'.
The logo has a reflection on the surface below it.

spatial: The word 'Fine' is above the word 'Dining'. The word 'TV' is to the right of 'Dining'. The reflection is below the main text.
